description: Follow-up work order opened after Inspector Tom Okafor could not locate a current bench-test certificate for Relief Valve V-045 on Boiler B-12 during the Q4 inspection round (see inspection_b12_relief_valve_2025q4). Required by REG-052 (Relief Valve Testing Frequency) and REG-014 (Boiler Pressure Vessel Inspection Code). Awaiting scheduling of bench test with certified vendor.
